_doc: THE ONE HOME for machine-knowable facts (truth-consolidation, session 48, 2026-06-20). Edit a fact HERE; every other mention is a pointer checked against this by tests/test_facts_reconcile.py. A human adjudicates MEANING; machines only compare values. MONEY RULE (HIGH-RISK): never seed a live balance/payroll/price as a cached 'human' value — money is 'runtime' (point to the live read) or omitted; derived config/code constants self-verify and are fine. Library + design: scripts/facts.py. Lineage (how each got true): facts_lineage.jsonl.

attendance_go_live_date.note: Historical/frozen — the day the attendance live path was switched on. An event, not a 'now' claim; can't drift. Lineage anchor.

attendance_live_flag.note: VOLATILE runtime flag (DB-backed master switch). Value NOT asserted by any checker — no prod connection from a doc-check. Freshness-flagged only; the accurate source is the live check above.

attendance_status.note: The exact contradiction that bit us (SUBSYSTEMS said 'IN BUILD' while CLAUDE said LIVE). No machine source for a subsystem status → protected ONLY by cross-doc agreement (assert, not generate). Honest limit: a coincidental 'LIVE' elsewhere isn't caught; the phrase anchor narrows that.

daily_report_chat_id.note: TWB REPORT group. Derived (AST read of config.py) AND checked in the doc — protected both ways.

expense_group_id.note: Accountant 'Expenses TWB' group, hardcoded in accountant/bot.py. Derived AND doc-checked.

owner_telegram_id.note: Owner's Telegram user id (approval routing). Derived from config.py by AST read.

stock_checks_chat_id.note: 'Stock Checks +Cleans +Mistakes' group the GM bot monitors. Derived from config.py by AST read.
